_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of how commercial and federal solutions solve Defense-related data environment and platform challenges.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, including vulnerability identification, penetration testing coordination, and security architecture review.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-002 (DA, cosine: 0.517), DG-K-001 (DG, cosine: 0.514).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.435). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [challenges, commercial, defense, environment, federal, knowledge] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, architecture, assessments, conducting, coordination, identification] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.885, R=0.863). P exceeds R by 0.022 — the DCWF element's 14 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of how commercial and federal solutions solve Defense-related data env" and "Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, inclu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.538 > STS 0.435 (gap +0.103). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [challenges, commercial, defense, environment, federal, knowledge]. WIDAI-only: [ai, architecture, assessments, conducting, coordination, identification].
